**So that** I don't rely on agent self-reporting.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Run arbitrary shell commands as verification (lint, test, typecheck, build)
- Configurable verification presets per project
- Timeout handling for long-running verifications
- Structured pass/fail results with output capture
- Gate progression: tasks can't move to `verified` without passing verification
- Parallel verification support

# Pi Fleet — Multi-Device Agent Orchestration Platform

## Product Requirements Document v1.0

---

## Vision

Pi Fleet is an open-source infrastructure that enables teams of AI agents (Pi agents) running across multiple physical devices to collaborate, coordinate, and build software together — controlled by an orchestrator agent on a separate machine. It is device-agnostic, company-agnostic, and designed for any team that wants to run autonomous AI development workflows across distributed hardw

tasks.description: Implement agent.spawn handler with prompt injection
tasks.context:
# Pi Fleet — Multi-Device Agent Orchestration Platform

## Product Requirements Document v1.0

---

## Vision

Pi Fleet is an open-source infrastructure that enables teams of AI agents (Pi agents) running across multiple physical devices to collaborate, coordinate, and build software together — controlled by an orchestrator agent on a separate machine. It is device-agnostic, company-agnostic, and designed for any team that wants to run autonomous AI development workflows across distributed hardw
